Video.summary: A man wonders if he should look for love while his wife battles dementia and the classic tale of the G spot gets a rewriting. This week on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - Is There Really a G Spot?

Image.alt: Sex Talk - Is There Really a G Spot?
Sex Talk - Is There Really a G Spot?
Sex Talk - Is There Really a G Spot?

Video.summary: A man falls asleep during sex. Is it a medical emergency? And could testosterone gel be the cure for painful sex in seniors? All this and more on Sex Talk with Dr. Lia.
Video.title: Sex Talk - The Benefits of Testosterone

Image.alt: Sex Talk - The Benefits of Testosterone
Sex Talk - The Benefits of Testosterone
Sex Talk - The Benefits of Testosterone

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews William Peters, who is recognized as a global leader in the field of near death and shared death studies and has spent decades studying end-of-life experiences. He is the founder of the Shared Crossing Project and director of its Research Initiative. His latest book is At Heaven's Door: What Shared Journeys to the Afterlife Teach About Dying Well and Living Better.
Video.title: The Aware Show: William Peters - Shared Death Experiences

Image.alt: The Aware Show: William Peters - Shared Death Experiences
The Aware Show: William Peters - Shared Death Experiences
The Aware Show: William Peters - Shared Death Experiences

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews John Assaraf, one of the leading high performance, success coaches in the world. He is a behavioral neuroscience researcher who has written four books including two NYT bestsellers and has been featured in 11 movies. He is CEO of MyNeuroGym.com, a neuroscience-based company, dedicated to helping individuals strengthen their mindset and skills, so they achieve their goals and dreams. Info: theawareshow.com/brainathon.
Video.title: The Aware Show: John Assaraf - The Power to Change

Image.alt: The Aware Show: John Assaraf - The Power to Change
The Aware Show: John Assaraf - The Power to Change
The Aware Show: John Assaraf - The Power to Change

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Lon, an author and artist who specializes in Sacred Geometry. Patterns make up all of nature and how we look and understand these magical constructs can make vast differences in our perceived reality. Lon explains how we all have the power within us to work magic and by understanding these sacred shapes and patterns, we can further experience our unlimited potential. She discusses her new book Modern Merlin.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Lon - Uncover Your Magical Powers

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Lon - Uncover Your Magical Powers
The Aware Show: Lon - Uncover Your Magical Powers
The Aware Show: Lon - Uncover Your Magical Powers

Video.summary: Host Lisa Garr interviews Mandy Morris, an author and entrepreneur who studies the science of manifestation. She explains how to manifest your dreams and live a life of endless possibilities. By removing the emotional, mental, and energetic blocks which hold us back, Mandy explains how we can reach a higher frequency. Her book is 8 Secrets to Powerful Manifesting: How to Create the Reality of Your Dreams.
Video.title: The Aware Show: Mandy Morris - Power of Manifestation

Image.alt: The Aware Show: Mandy Morris - Power of Manifestation
The Aware Show: Mandy Morris - Power of Manifestation
The Aware Show: Mandy Morris - Power of Manifestation

Video.summary: Medical experts meet to discuss seasonal allergies and why each spring brings more intense allergy symptoms than the last.
Video.title: Why Are Allergies Getting Worse Every Year?

Image.alt: Why Are Allergies Getting Worse Every Year?
Why Are Allergies Getting Worse Every Year?
Why Are Allergies Getting Worse Every Year?

Video.summary: We’re joined by the former chief of staff at the CDC to discuss what the agency learned during the COVID-19 pandemic and how it plans to move forward. We’ll also take a look at the long-term effects of COVID and how you can boost your vaccine’s effectiveness even further.
Video.title: What's Next for the CDC?

Image.alt: What's Next for the CDC?
What's Next for the CDC?
What's Next for the CDC?

Video.summary: We’re joined by the president and CEO of March of Dimes to discuss the risks that pregnant women — particularly women of color — still face in the United States.
Video.title: Maternity Risks

Image.alt: Maternity Risks
Maternity Risks
Maternity Risks

Video.summary: In this episode, we take a look at the mental health benefits of healthy eating and exercising and explore the future of depression treatment, while debunking popular myths about causes and cures for depression.
Video.title: The Future of Mental Health Treatment

Image.alt: The Future of Mental Health Treatment
The Future of Mental Health Treatment
The Future of Mental Health Treatment

Video.summary: Invite the mind into harmony as you take it nice and easy with today’s posture, Janu Sirsasana.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 8 Harmony Janu Sirasana

Image.alt: Yoga Is - Day 8 Harmony Janu Sirasana
Yoga Is - Day 8 Harmony Janu Sirasana
Yoga Is - Day 8 Harmony Janu Sirasana

Video.summary: Invite kindness into your body, using Marichasana A as a framework for integrating tenderness into your practice.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 9 Kindness Marichasana A

Image.alt: Yoga Is - Day 9 Kindness Marichasana A
Yoga Is - Day 9 Kindness Marichasana A
Yoga Is - Day 9 Kindness Marichasana A

Video.summary: You can be happy for no reason at all… Happiness can be our natural state. Start day 10 with attention at the heart center and the recollection of an uplifting memory. Holding on to that feeling, move into practice with a warm up rooted in backbending and sun salutations. Next, follow Kino through through a hip opening sequence. As we approach today’s pinnacle pose, Baddha Konasana, remember that there is no need for the body to be in any particular place. Practice acceptance and happiness here and now.
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 10 Happiness Baddha Konasana

Image.alt: Yoga Is - Day 10 Happiness Baddha Konasana
Yoga Is - Day 10 Happiness Baddha Konasana
Yoga Is - Day 10 Happiness Baddha Konasana

Video.summary: Day 11 of the challenge is centered around a quality that is perhaps the very essence of being a yogi: Compassion
Video.title: Yoga Is - Day 11 Compassion Shalabhasana

Image.alt: Yoga Is - Day 11 Compassion Shalabhasana
Yoga Is - Day 11 Compassion Shalabhasana
Yoga Is - Day 11 Compassion Shalabhasana

Video.summary: Do you feel both captivated and exhausted by city life? Are the conveniences worth the chaos? In this episode of the Rooted in Wellness podcast, join me, Wade Lightheart, and Matt Gallant as we explore the challenges of maintaining balance in busy urban environments and the serene contrast of ashram life.
Video.title: Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life

Image.alt: Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life
Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life
Wade Lightheart + Matt Gallant: Plant-Based Muscle Building, Digestion Optimization + Balancing Urban Life

Video.summary: Have you wondered how to biohack your health as a woman? Taking control to live your best life is what we dive into in this episode with guest Aggie Lal.
Video.title: Aggie Lal: Secrets to Thriving Through Biohacking and Ancient Wisdom for Women

Image.alt: Aggie Lal: Secrets to Thriving Through Biohacking and Ancient Wisdom for Women
Aggie Lal: Secrets to Thriving Through Biohacking and Ancient Wisdom for Women
Aggie Lal: Secrets to Thriving Through Biohacking and Ancient Wisdom for Women

Video.summary: La Dolce Vita (Sweet Life) - Ten years after the divorce from Maxwell Turner, with children grown, Celeste Wright Turner makes a choice to start living her life. No SEX with the EX! Simon and Mimi try to get Celeste’s head on straight when it comes to Maxwell’s charm. After facing an emotional challenge, Celeste decides to take a trip abroad.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita
The Wright Turn: La Dolce Vita

Video.summary: London Bridges Burning Down - Breakdowns are inevitable when Celeste tries to run from her past. Her therapist gives Celeste sound advice on how to spice up her sex life.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down
The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down
The Wright Turn: London Bridges Burning Down

Video.summary: Butter Me Up - Celeste returns back to Los Angeles after her journey. Her friends throw her a sex toy birthday party. When an old flame comes back, can he melt her butter? Nikki reveals a trauma from her childhood.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up
The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up
The Wright Turn: Butter Me Up

Video.summary: Pearl Necklace - Can a long-desired gift bring Max and Celeste closer together? While Father Cross’s guilty pleasure is exposed, leaving a young family member seeking revenge and Celeste on his trail. A Fundraiser brings Maddy back to the stage with new comic material on the stage of Denim & Diamonds fundraiser for Autism Care Today.
Video.title: The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace

Image.alt: The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace
The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace
The Wright Turn: The Pearl Necklace

Video.summary: Dawa explores whether your mind controls you or you control your mind, as well as, how mindfulness can erase negative thinking and bad habits.
Video.title: Using Mindfulness to Erase Negative Habits With Dawa Tarchin Phillips

Image.alt: Using Mindfulness to Erase Negative Habits With Dawa Tarchin Phillips
Using Mindfulness to Erase Negative Habits With Dawa Tarchin Phillips
Using Mindfulness to Erase Negative Habits With Dawa Tarchin Phillips

Video.summary: A film about the challenges we face that then become that match point that ignites something within us that becomes our gift to the world.
Video.title: When Sparks Ignite

Image.alt: When Sparks Ignite
When Sparks Ignite

Video.summary: DESCENDING THE MOUTNAIN takes us takes us on a journey of mystical revelations, experienced through meditation and psilocybin by blending visual art, spiritual understanding, and scientific research.
Video.title: DESCENDING THE MOUNTAIN

Image.alt: DESCENDING THE MOUNTAIN
DESCENDING THE MOUNTAIN

Video.summary: Fourteen-year-old Mackenzie, a troubled teen, is sent by her mother to live with her uncle in Juneau, Alaska. She runs away and an unlikely friendship forms in the Alaskan wilderness, giving a runaway girl hope and sanctuary in America's last frontier.
Video.title: Episode 1

Image.alt: Episode 1
Episode 1
Episode 1

Video.summary: Unsupersize Me documents the inspiring story of personal trainer Juan-Carlos Asse and his quest to prove that a whole foods, plant based diet coupled with an exercise regimen is capable of remarkably improving the health of any and every individual.
Video.title: Episode 1

Image.alt: Episode 1
Episode 1
Episode 1

Video.summary: Unsupersize Us follows director Juan-Carlos Asse takes five people from his hometown that suffer from common health issues and puts them on a regimen of a plant based diet and exercise, changing their lives forever.
Video.title: Episode 1

Image.alt: Episode 1
Episode 1
Episode 1
